title: dortmanna muscoides
intro: Dortmanna muscoides, also known as the Dortmann's muskweed or common yarrow, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dortmanna muscoides include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna muscoides include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used to treat various ailments.
